option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# Fix para OutOfMemoryError no Build Nativo
## Problema Ao fazer build da imagem Docker nativa, o erro ocorria: ``` Error creating bean with name 'riskRereference': Instantiation of supplied bean failed Caused by: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Garbage-collected heap size exceeded ```
## Causa Raiz - O arquivo `references.json` tem **95 MB** com **1 milhão de vetores** - Cada vetor contém 14 floats - Carregamento desoptimizado estava consumindo muita memória intermediária - GraalVM Native Image tinha heap limitada durante o build
## Soluções Implementadas
### 1. Aumentar Heap no `pom.xml` (native profile) ```xml <buildArgs combine.children="append"> <arg>-H:MaxHeapSize=2g</arg> <!-- Native image heap size --> </buildArgs> <jvmArgs combine.children="append"> <arg>-Xmx2g</arg> <!-- Build JVM heap size --> <arg>-XX:+UseG1GC</arg> </jvmArgs> ```
### 2. Aumentar Memória no `Dockerfile.native` ```dockerfile # Set memory limits for the builder # Allocate 4GB to heap for native image build to handle large JSON files ENV JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-Xms512m -Xmx4g" ```
### 3. Otimizar Desserialização em `InitializeConfiguration.java` - Implementar **streaming parser** em vez de deserializar tudo em memória - Usar `JsonParser` para processar um item por vez - Reduzir objetos intermediários que consomem memória
## Como Fazer Build
### Build Local (Recomendado para testes) ```bash ./mvnw clean -Pnative native:compile --no-transfer-progress -DskipTests ```
### Build Docker Nativo ```bash docker build -f Dockerfile.native -t rinha-fraud-detection-engine:latest-native . ```
### Com Script Helper ```bash ./build_native_fixed.sh docker ```
## Monitoramento
Para monitorar o progress do build: ```bash docker build --progress=plain -f Dockerfile.native -t rinha-fraud-detection-engine:latest-native . ```
Para ver logs do container após build: ```bash docker logs -f api-1 ```
## Estimativas de Performance
- **Tempo de Build**: 10-15 minutos (primeira vez) - **Memória Build**: ~4GB alocada - **Tamanho do Executável**: ~50-100 MB - **Startup Time**: < 1 segundo - **Runtime Memory**: ~160 MB por container
## Próximos Passos (Opcional)
Se ainda houver problemas de memória:
1. **Aumentar heap ainda mais** se tiver recurso ```dockerfile ENV JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="-Xms1g -Xmx8g" ```
2. **Usar compressão do arquivo JSON** - Comprimir `references.json` em gzip - Descomprimir em memória durante a inicialização
3. **Dividir arquivo em chunks** - Particionar `references.json` em vários arquivos menores - Carregar sob demanda (lazy loading)
## Validação
Para validar se a solução funcionou:
```bash # Health check curl http://localhost:8080/ready
# Test fraud detection curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/fraud-score \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{...request...}' ```
## Referências
- [GraalVM Native Image Memory Settings](https://www.graalvm.org/latest/reference-manual/native-image/dynamic-features/Reflection/) - [Spring Boot Native Documentation](https://docs.spring.io/spring-nativeframework/reference/index.html) - [Jackson Streaming API](https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson-core/wiki/JsonParser)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
#!/bin/bash # Script para build nativo com melhor diagnóstico de memória
set -e
OS_TYPE=$(uname -s) DOCKER_MEMORY_MB=8000 # 8GB for builder DOCKER_MEMORY_RUNTIME_MB=160 # Runtime limit in docker-compose
echo " Fraud Detection Engine - Native Image Build with Memory Fix" echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━" echo "" echo " Configuration:" echo " Build Memory: ${DOCKER_MEMORY_MB}MB" echo " Runtime Memory: ${DOCKER_MEMORY_RUNTIME_MB}MB" echo " OS: $OS_TYPE" echo ""
if [ "$1" == "local" ]; then echo " Building Native Image Locally..." echo "" echo "⚠️ Make sure you have:" echo " - 8GB+ available RAM" echo " - GraalVM 25.0.2+ installed" echo " - Native image component installed" echo ""
read -p "Continue? (y/n) " -n 1 -r echo if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then cd "$(dirname "$0")"
echo " Cleaning previous builds..." ./mvnw clean -q 2>/dev/null || true
echo " Building with native profile..." ./mvnw -Pnative native:compile --no-transfer-progress -DskipTests -q
echo "" echo "✅ Native executable created at: target/fraud-detection-engine" echo "" echo " Test it locally:" echo " ./target/fraud-detection-engine &" echo " sleep 2 && curl http://localhost:8080/ready" fi
elif [ "$1" == "docker" ] || [ -z "$1" ]; then echo " Building Docker Image (Native)..." echo ""
if ! command -v docker &> /dev/null; then echo "❌ Docker not found. Please install Docker." exit 1 fi
cd "$(dirname "$0")"
echo " Building image 'rinha-fraud-detection-engine:latest-native'..." echo "⏱️ This will take 10-15 minutes on first build" echo ""
docker build \ -f Dockerfile.native \ -t rinha-fraud-detection-engine:latest-native \ --progress=plain \ .
echo "" echo "✅ Docker image built successfully!" echo "" echo " Next steps:" echo "" echo " 1. Start containers:" echo " docker-compose up -d api-1 api-2 nginx" echo "" echo " 2. Check health:" echo " docker logs -f api-1" echo " curl http://localhost:8080/ready" echo "" echo " 3. Test the API:" echo " curl -X POST http://localhost:9999/fraud-score \\" echo " -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\" echo " -d '{...}'" echo ""
elif [ "$1" == "clean" ]; then echo " Cleaning build artifacts..." ./mvnw clean -q docker rmi rinha-fraud-detection-engine:latest-native 2>/dev/null || true echo "✅ Cleaned!"
elif [ "$1" == "logs" ]; then docker logs -f "${2:-api-1}"
elif [ "$1" == "stop" ]; then echo " Stopping containers..." docker-compose down echo "✅ Stopped!"
else cat <<EOF Usage: $0 [command]
Commands: local Build native executable locally docker Build Docker image (default) clean Clean build artifacts logs Show container logs (default: api-1) stop Stop all containers
Examples: $0 # Build Docker image $0 local # Build locally $0 logs api-2 # Show api-2 logs $0 clean # Clean all EOF exit 1 fi
echo ""
